data.name: 我與來自風城的畸角少女
data.detailed_description:
Join our Discord!


Other premium games



Other premium games


關於此遊戲

這是一個純愛向的劇情AVG
(和失落之白同世界觀)

風城，一個存在於穆阿大陸上歷史悠久的地區。
顧名思義，生命在這裡像風一樣的來去無蹤、誕生消逝，無人在意。
由於地理位置特殊，長年有躲避戰亂的難民前來，因此也被稱為難民區。
風城有著多元且互相衝突的文化、人種，各種紛亂與貪贓枉法，幾百年來未曾消停過。

玩家將以傑恩的視角展開故事──
這個曾經出身於風城的孤兒，靠著自己的努力擺脫了貧困的環境。
在一次返回風城的因緣際會下，結識了被當作商品而逃亡的獸人少女(畸角人)，歐菲莉亞

屬於兩人的故事，也在此展開序幕。


◆ 簡易的互動養成
◆ 精美的CG與立繪
◆ 動人心弦的日常小故事
◆ Live2D動畫

data.short_description: 這是一個純愛向的AVG。身為當紅作家的傑恩，前往自己出生的難民區，撿到被當作商品而逃亡的獸人少女"歐菲莉亞"，所展開的同居故事
data.supported_languages: 繁體中文, 英文, 簡體中文
data.reviews:
“這個世界需要更多貓娘”
10/10 – Weissgarden純白花園

“黑肉貓娘太少了，我的幻肢得不到照顧，所以來自己弄一隻”
100/10 – 梅果子Plumko

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP or higher
  • 處理器: Intel
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP or higher
  • 處理器: Intel I5/I7
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: Days with Ophelia: The Girl From Wind City
data.detailed_description:
Join our Discord!


Other premium games



Other premium games


About the Game

This is a pure love story AVG
(Same worldview of Eternal Liiivie)

Wind City, an area with a long history that exists on the Mua continent.
As the name implies, lives here come and goes like the wind without a trace, birth, and disappearance, no one cares.
Due to its special geographical location, refugees who have escaped the war have come for many years, so it is also called a refugee area.
Wind City has a diverse and conflicting culture, race, all kinds of chaos, and corruption, which have never ceased for hundreds of years.

Players will unfold the story from Jayne's perspective──
This orphan, who was once born in Wind City, got rid of the poverty-environment by his efforts.
After returning to the Wind City by chance, he met the catgirl (Malformed angle human) who fled as a commodity, Ophelia.

The story that belongs to the two also begins here.


◆ Can change Ophelia’s dress
◆ Touching daily stories.
◆ Live2D animations.

data.short_description: This is a pure love AVG. As a popular writer, Jayne went to the refugee area where he was born and found the catgirl "Ophelia" who fled as a commodity.
data.reviews:
“This world needs more catgirls”
10/10 – Weissgarden純白花園

“I just want more catgirls :)”
100/10 – 梅果子Plumko
